def: A solid shape with a flat bottom and sides that go up to one point on top.
example: The Egyptian pyramids have a square bottom and a point on top.

def: One of the flat sides of a pyramid that is shaped like a triangle.
example: A pyramid with a square bottom has 4 triangular faces.

def: The total flat space on all the outside sides of a shape added together.
example: Add the bottom plus all the triangle sides to get surface area.

def: The flat bottom side that a shape sits on.
example: A pyramid can have a square base.

def: How much flat space is inside one shape, like one side.
example: A triangle side that is 6 wide and 4 tall has an area of 12.
